templates.app_dev_overlay:
{app_service}:
    build:
      target: development
    ports:
      - "${DEPLOY_HOST_PORT:-5171}:5171"
    volumes:
      - {app_dev_mount}:/app
      - /app/node_modules
    environment:
      VITE_API_URL: ${VITE_API_URL:-}
    env_file:
      - {secrets_module}/.env.dev
    develop:
      watch:
        - action: sync
          path: ./apps/geostat/src
          target: /app/apps/geostat/src
        - action: rebuild
          path: ./apps/geostat/package.json
templates.app_prod_overlay:
{app_service}:
    build:
      target: production
      args:
        VITE_API_URL: ${VITE_API_URL:-}
    ports:
      - "${DEPLOY_HOST_PORT:-5171}:80"
    env_file:
      - {secrets_module}/.env.prod
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "wget", "-qO-", "http://localhost/"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 10s

ops/compose/docker-compose.yml.comment: # Base — used as foundation for dev (override) and prod (overlay)

ops/compose/docker-compose.override.yml.comment: # Dev — auto-merged on: docker compose up (run from project root)

ops/compose/docker-compose.prod.yml.comment: # Production — docker compose -f ops/compose/docker-compose.yml -f ops/compose/docker-compose.prod.yml up -d
